body.description: Main message body shown beneath the title. Can be left blank if the long-form wizard text carries the message.

long_form_wizard_text.description: Optional long-form text shown in the notification wizard expanded view.

notification_style.description:
Visual style for the notification: 'envelope', 'scroll', or 'galactic'.

* `envelope` - envelope
* `scroll` - scroll
* `galactic` - galactic

priority.description:
Delivery priority: 'normal' (popover only) or 'critical' (popover plus persistent toast).

* `normal` - NORMAL
* `critical` - CRITICAL

skill.description: Optional skill identifier used by the wizard UI to render an associated capability for the user.

target_user_ids.description: IDs of the PostHog users who should receive this notification. Each user will receive the notification in their current project. Users without a current team are skipped.

title.description: Short headline shown to the user in the notification UI (max 255 characters).
